'''bamala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encapsulant|encapsulant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encapsulant|encapsulant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bamala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæmælæth|bæmælæth]] || [[word:bæmælæj|bæmælæj]] || [[word:bæmælæsh|bæmælæsh]] || [[word:bæmælæ|bæmælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bamamalath|bamamalath]] || [[word:bamamalaj|bamamalaj]] || [[word:bamamalash|bamamalash]] || [[word:bamamala|bamamala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bamalath|bamalath]] || [[word:bamalaj|bamalaj]] || [[word:bamalash|bamalash]] || [[word:bamala|bamala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bamaflath|bamaflath]] || [[word:bamaflaj|bamaflaj]] || [[word:bamaflash|bamaflash]] || [[word:bamaflaf|bamaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bamalatha|bamalatha]] || [[word:bamalaja|bamalaja]] || [[word:bamalasha|bamalasha]] || [[word:bamalaka|bamalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bamalath|bamalath]] || [[word:bamalaj|bamalaj]] || [[word:bamalash|bamalash]] || [[word:bamala|bamala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bamalathal|bamalathal]] || [[word:bamalajal|bamalajal]] || [[word:bamalashal|bamalashal]] || [[word:bamalakal|bamalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bamalathatha|bamalathatha]] || [[word:bamalajaja|bamalajaja]] || [[word:bamalashasha|bamalashasha]] || [[word:bamalaka|bamalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bamalathan|bamalathan]] || [[word:bamalajan|bamalajan]] || [[word:bamalashan|bamalashan]] || [[word:bamalakan|bamalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bamalathaoro|bamalathaoro]] || [[word:bamalajaoro|bamalajaoro]] || [[word:bamalashaoro|bamalashaoro]] || [[word:bamalakaoro|bamalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
